nasb.text: requesting a concession against Paul, that he might have him brought to Jerusalem (at the same time, setting an ambush to kill him on the way).

esv.text: asking as a favor against Paul that he summon him to Jerusalem—because they were planning an ambush to kill him on the way.

cnv.text: 求他恩准對付保羅，把保羅解來耶路撒冷，他們好埋伏在路上殺死他。

ccb.text: 恳求他将保罗押回耶路撒冷，他们想在途中埋伏杀害保罗。

csbs.text: 请他恩准，把保罗叫到耶路撒冷来。他们策划要在路上埋伏杀了保罗。
